title: cyperus tenuis var. luridus
intro: Cyperus tenuis var. luridus, also known as yellow sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, characterized by its bright yellow or greenish-yellow stems and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus tenuis var. luridus include its ability to help manage fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and even treat certain types of skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
